content:
- Executed task 15 (`final double-check gate`) end-to-end after promoting plan to NOW EXECUTE.
- Created `.ralph/evidence/15-final-gate/` with: preflight blocker snapshot, baseline git status, test-quality audit, HA-autonomy audit, feature trace matrix, and real-binary audit.
- Ran mandatory gates in required order with strict pipefail logging:
  - `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 make check`
  - `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 make test`
  - `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 make test-bdd`
  - `CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 make lint`
- All required gates passed; logs + timestamps captured in `gate-summary.md` and per-command logs.
- Updated task file header to done/passes/passing true and checked all acceptance/execution checkboxes with evidence references.
- Added a cross-app learning to `AGENTS.md`: always use `set -o pipefail` when piping gate commands to `tee`.
- Ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh` and committed task completion with required message format.
- Should do next (if resumed): proceed to the next selected task from `.ralph/current_task.txt`; no open issue from task 15 remains.

- Ran progress read and reviewed .ralph/current_tasks.md to pick the next task as Choose-Task.
- Applied selection rules: no bug task is failing (all bug tasks show passes/passing true), meta-task exists but is superseded by pending passes=false tasks, and no pending ultra_high task remains. Chose highest-priority unblocked pending task: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/05c-task-zero-panic-unwrap-expect-across-runtime-and-tests.md.
- Wrote that exact path into .ralph/current_task.txt. Next step for the executor agent is to implement task 05c and re-run required gates.

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt and loaded task .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/05c-task-zero-panic-unwrap-expect-across-runtime-and-tests.md.
- Performed parallel research sweeps (8-way command batches) to validate actual repository state before planning.
- Found stale inventory in task description: repo-wide panic/expect/unwrap scans currently return zero matches across src/tests, including all listed hotspot files.
- Confirmed remaining actionable gaps are lint-enforcement related: src/lib.rs still has cfg_attr(not(test), deny(...)) and Makefile strict clippy pass currently targets --lib only.
- Wrote a full detailed execution plan into the task file and appended TO BE VERIFIED exactly as requested; did not execute implementation phase.
- Next step for the next phase: read TO BE VERIFIED state, perform deep skeptical verification with required parallel research, alter at least one plan item, then switch marker to NOW EXECUTE.
